title: pilogyne samoensis
intro: Pilogyne samoensis, also known as the Samoan tea tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as camphor and borneol, known for their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pilogyne samoensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations, making it a popular remedy in traditional Samoan medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
